title: cedrus effusa
intro: Cedrus effusa, also known as Atlas Cedar or Himalayan Cedar, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayas. The essential oil extracted from the Cedrus deodora, which is often confused with Cedrus effusa, is widely recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian and Chinese medicine. The oil, which contains alpha-pinene, beta-pinene, and limonene, has been used to relieve respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations such as essential oil, powder, and capsules are commonly used to harness its health benefits, including immune system support, antioxidant properties, and antimicrobial action.
